judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on two photographs (flying saucer model with star insignia, and a wind tunnel model) and their general categories, but Description B adds specific caption text and visual details (exhaust plumes, landing gear) not mentioned in A, with no direct contradiction on quoted text.
original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a disc-shaped aircraft with a central fuselage and a vertical tail fin, appearing to be a model or prototype. The aircraft has a U.S. military star insignia visible on the side.
Black-and-white photograph of a long, thin, delta-wing aircraft model mounted on a support in a wind tunnel environment.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A magazine page scan containing two black-and-white aircraft photographs on the left and a column of article text on the right; the upper photo shows a disk-like Navy flounder project model, and the lower photo shows an early model tested in a wind tunnel, each with a caption.*
